pageDescription: Calculate your body surface area using medical formulas like Du Bois, Mosteller, Haycock, and Gehan & George

definition.title: Body Surface Area Definition
definition.description: BSA is the total surface area of the human body, usually expressed in square meters (m²)

formulas.title: Calculation Formulas
formulas.description: Different formulas are used for adults and children, with Du Bois being the clinical standard

applications.title: Medical Applications
applications.description: Used for drug dosing, fluid replacement, and kidney function assessments

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides BSA estimates only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Consult healthcare professionals for personalized medical assessments

importantNotesList: BSA is more accurate than BMI for certain medical calculations
Different formulas may be more appropriate for specific populations
Results should not replace professional medical advice
Body composition and hydration can affect accuracy

messages.enterInformation: Enter your weight and height to calculate body surface area
messages.resultMessage: Your body surface area calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides body surface area estimates based on standard medical formulas. Results should not replace professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Individual assessments should be conducted by qualified healthcare professionals.

seekHelp.title: Health Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized medical assessments and treatment plans, consult with healthcare professionals who can provide guidance based on individual needs and medical history.

tooltips.formula: Select the formula to use for BSA calculation
